userStories.title: Centralize ticket type/priority options and fix create-form select behavior
userStories.description: Replace hardcoded type validation list in CreateTicketDialog.vue with API-aligned enum set. Ensure type and priority selects are fully controlled and submit correctly. Add missing i18n keys for TASK and QUESTION ticket types.
acceptanceCriteria: When ticket type options render in CreateTicketDialog.vue, selectable values are BUG, ENHANCEMENT, TASK, and QUESTION
Given user selects a ticket type, when form submits, payload field type equals selected value
Given user selects priority, when form submits, payload field priority equals selected value
Given selected type is not in allowed enum set, when submit attempted, validation blocks request
Given selected type is not in allowed enum set, when submit attempted, localized type error text is shown

userStories.title: Build reusable markdown write/preview editor component
userStories.description: Create a MarkdownEditor.vue component with write/preview tabs using existing Tabs shadcn component. Component must handle markdown rendering with fail-open error handling, support v-model binding, and preserve line breaks and fenced code blocks.
acceptanceCriteria: When markdown editor renders in write mode, editable markdown source is bound to modelValue
When user switches editor to preview mode, rendered output reflects current markdown source
Given markdown preview renderer throws, when preview requested, component shows plain-text fallback instead of breaking UI
Given parent uses v-model, when editor content changes, component emits updated modelValue

userStories.title: Apply markdown editor to ticket create and ticket edit description flows
userStories.description: Replace plain textarea in CreateTicketDialog with markdown editor. Add edit mode to ticket detail page [ref].vue that allows updating title, description, and priority via PATCH /projects/:slug/tickets/:ref. On success, refresh ticket data and update rendered description display.
acceptanceCriteria: When create-ticket dialog description field shown, markdown editor write/preview UI replaces plain textarea
Given ticket detail page enters edit state, when user updates description and saves, client calls PATCH /projects/:slug/tickets/:ref with updated description
Given ticket detail page enters edit state, when user updates title and saves, client calls PATCH /projects/:slug/tickets/:ref with updated title
Given ticket detail page enters edit state, when user updates priority and saves, client calls PATCH /projects/:slug/tickets/:ref with updated priority
Given ticket edit save succeeds, when request resolves, ticket detail view refreshes
Given ticket edit save succeeds, when request resolves, description panel displays updated rendered markdown
Given ticket edit save fails, when request rejects, edit state and unsaved draft remain available to user

userStories.title: Apply markdown editor to comment create and add comment edit flow
userStories.description: Replace plain textarea in CommentThread.vue comment form with markdown editor. Add per-comment edit action that allows updating comment body via PATCH /comments/:id. Preserve draft on API failure with localized error toast.
acceptanceCriteria: When comment create form renders in CommentThread.vue, comment body input uses markdown editor write/preview UI
Given user edits existing comment body and saves, when request sent, client calls PATCH /comments/:id with updated body
Given comment edit save succeeds, when request resolves, updated comment body shown in thread render
Given comment edit save fails, when request rejects, inline edit draft is preserved
Given comment edit save fails, when request rejects, localized error toast is shown

analysis:
## Analysis Summary

### Current State
1. **Enum Mismatch**: `CreateTicketDialog.vue` (line 29-31) only offers BUG and ENHANCEMENT, but API enum `TicketType` in `apps/api/src/common/enums.ts:17-22` has BUG, ENHANCEMENT, TASK, QUESTION
2. **Priority is correct**: LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, CRITICAL all present in CreateTicketDialog
3. **Missing i18n keys**: tickets.type.TASK and tickets.type.QUESTION missing in both en.json and zh.json
4. **No markdown editor**: Plain Textarea.vue (13 lines) with no write/preview tabs
5. **No ticket edit**: `[project]/tickets/[ref].vue` displays ticket but has no edit mode
6. **No comment edit**: CommentThread.vue creates comments but cannot edit existing ones

### Files to Modify
1. `apps/web/components/CreateTicketDialog.vue` - Fix type options, add markdown editor
2. `apps/web/pages/[project]/tickets/[ref].vue` - Add edit capability for title, description, priority
3. `apps/web/components/CommentThread.vue` - Add markdown editor, add per-comment edit
4. `apps/web/i18n/locales/en.json` - Add TASK, QUESTION type translations
5. `apps/web/i18n/locales/zh.json` - Add TASK, QUESTION type translations

### New Files to Create
1. `apps/web/components/MarkdownEditor.vue` - Reusable write/preview markdown component
2. `apps/web/composables/useTicketTypes.ts` - Shared ticket type constants (optional - could also inline)

### Risks
- Markdown preview rendering could fail on malformed input → fail-open with plain text fallback
- API update failures must preserve editor state (don't reset form)
- Concurrent edit conflicts not in scope (no optimistic locking)

### Architecture Decisions
- Use existing Tabs component from shadcn for write/preview switching
- Reuse existing form stack (vee-validate + zod)
- Reuse existing API pattern (useApi, extractApiError, toasts)
- Markdown rendering: use `marked` library (standard for Node/browser markdown parsing)
- Fail-open strategy for preview: try/catch around marked.parse(), show plain text on error

### Migration Notes
- Add i18n keys before using them in components
- No database migrations needed (API enums already correct)
- Generated OpenAPI client will need regeneration after API changes (if any)
